title: AC Not Cooling
content_html:
Fast Answer

If your AC isn't cooling, it could be due to electrical, mechanical, chemical, or structural issues.

If this sounds like your issue, you'll need to diagnose the root cause immediately.

Most homeowners fix this by comparing prices. Get quotes from local HVAC pros to avoid worsening damage.

Recommended Tools

Air Filter Multimeter Coil Cleaner

Need Help Fixing This?

Get quotes from local HVAC pros.
